task_completion.description: Verify the dataset 'sample_order_lines2023' is loaded into the workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface shows 'sample_order_lines2023' or its specific columns like 'Revenue' and 'Product Category'.

task_completion.description: Verify a horizontal bar chart is created using 'Revenue' and 'Product Category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal bar chart is visible on the canvas. The grammar/properties panel shows 'Horizontal Bar' as the visualization type, with 'Product Category' and 'Revenue' assigned to the axes.

task_completion.description: Verify a reference line for the average revenue is added and labeled 'Category Average'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reference line is visible across the chart indicating the average. The properties panel for analytics/reference lines shows the method set to 'Average' and the label set to 'Category Average', or the label is visible directly on the chart.

task_completion.description: Verify a constant reference line at 300,000 is added and labeled 'Target: $300K'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second reference line is visible at the 300,000 mark on the Revenue axis. The properties panel shows a constant value of 300000 and the label 'Target: $300K', or the label is visible directly on the chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Revenue_Targets'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar or the active tab in Oracle Analytics Desktop displays the name 'Revenue_Targets'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the visualization and reference lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OAD interface (e.g., drag-and-drop actions, properties panel adjustments, save dialogs) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered by the Oracle Analytics application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears within the OAD canvas area with standard OAD UI elements, axes, and legends, not as an imported static image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by writing a script to generate the .dva file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors or IDEs (like Notepad, VS Code, Python scripts) are open showing code that generates the workbook file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dataset is 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'. The chart must be a 'Horizontal Bar' chart. Reference Line 1 must be an 'Average' line. Reference Line 2 must be a constant value of 300000. The final workbook must be saved as 'Revenue_Targets.dva'.
